name: Man Sang International Limited
summary: Man Sang International Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the development, leasing, and sale of properties in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Property and Management Services segments. The company The company sells residential apartments; and leases serviced apartments and commercial units in the shopping mall. It also provides property management services. The company was incorporated in 1997 and is based in Chai Wan, Hong Kong. Man Sang International Limited is a subsidiary of China DaDi Group Limited.
